heading: Central Office
label: 314 Central Office
text: The Central Office of the Department shall be in the District of Columbia.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 314 was renumbered .section 1114 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 230(a) of this titlePub. L. 102–83, § 2(a)
